values: Read memory before starting, write memory after completing
non_negotiable_rules: Always read memory before starting a task
Documentation updates for changed APIs are part of the same task, not follow-on

failures.description: await used in non-async function in cost-tracker.mjs report(). Would have caused syntax error at runtime.
failures.lesson: When adding async imports (await import()) to an existing function, always verify the function signature is async. Add to review checklist.
failures.ruleAdded: Review checklist: verify async/await consistency when modifying function bodies

failures.description: model-manager.mjs reset() read agentCfg.activeModel AFTER setting it to null, logging null instead of the previous value.
failures.lesson: Save values to local variables before mutating object properties when the old value is needed.

failures.description: model-manager.mjs top-level import of notify.mjs triggered notify's CLI side effects, printing help text instead of running model-manager check.
failures.lesson: Dynamic imports of modules with CLI entry points must be deferred (lazy wrapper) to avoid side effects. Never top-level await import() a CLI module.

failures.description: setup.mjs --discover scanned root package.json but real app was in subdirectory. Reported wrong language, framework, and test command.
failures.lesson: Discovery must check agents/project.json for appDir and scan the app subdirectory. Root package.json may be a bare monorepo wrapper.

failures.description: load-config.mjs normalized model and fallbackChain but not modelPreferences values. Shorthand names in preferences wouldn't match full IDs elsewhere.
failures.lesson: When normalizing a config object, apply the normalization to ALL fields that contain the same type of value, not just the obvious ones.

failures.description: paperclip.mjs syncConfig returned creds (including API key) and patchAgent function reference in its return value. Security leak.
failures.lesson: Adapter interface returns must match the contract exactly. Never expose credentials in return values. Never leak internal functions.

_failure_schema.description: What happened and why it was a problem
_failure_schema.lesson: Specific action taken to prevent recurrence
_failure_schema.ruleAdded: Reference to rule added (critical only), null otherwise

_severity_response.critical: Add immediate rule to AGENT.md non-negotiable rules
_severity_response.high: Add check item to reviewer checklist
